title: Raku Game File (.raku)
description: Schema for .raku game definition files (Standard Format). Generate valid .raku files by following this schema. Every game must have a schema_version, game object, and ai_disclosure for platform compliance.

schema_version.description: Must be '1.0' for the current Standard Format.

game.description: Core game metadata including title, genre, template selection, and player count.

genre.description: Game genre. Determines which engine template is loaded.

template.description: Template identifier matching an available game template (e.g., 'rpg-adventure', 'space-shooter', 'tower-defense').

description.description: Brief description of the game concept and gameplay.

content_pack.description: References a first-party content pack for curated assets.

mode.description: Prototype for fast iteration; presentation for polished demos.

ai.description: AI subsystem configuration: dynamic difficulty adjustment (DDA), NPC personality, emotional tracking, and player profiling.

target_flow_state.description: Target flow state for DDA (0=easy, 1=hard). 0.5-0.7 recommended.

emotional_tracking.description: Track player emotional state for adaptive responses.

entities.description: Game entities: players, NPCs, enemies, collectibles, etc. Each entity has a type, properties, and optional AI behavior.

type.description: Entity type: player_character, npc, enemy_wave, collectible, obstacle, projectile, etc.

count.description: Number of this entity to spawn.

ai_behavior.description: AI behavior preset: friendly, hostile, territorial, patrol, merchant, boss, etc.

properties.description: Entity-specific properties (name, role, weapons, drop tables, etc.).

scenes.description: Game scenes/levels. Each scene has a name, type, and associated entities.

entities.description: Entity types present in this scene.

vrs_enabled.description: Variable rate shading for XR performance.

post_processing.description: Post-processing effects: ssao, bloom, color-grading, fog, motion-blur, etc.

audio.description: Audio configuration including spatial audio and adaptive music.

audio_plan.description: Declares audio asset mapping for adaptive music and SFX.

sfx.description: Sound effect mappings (weapon_fire, impact, explosion, pickup, etc.).

ui.description: UI sound mappings (click, confirm, error, etc.).

ai_disclosure.description: REQUIRED for platform compliance. Declares AI usage in the game for ESRB/PEGI/storefront policies.

live_generated.description: Whether AI generates content at runtime.

pre_generated.description: Whether AI was used to generate static content.

description.description: Human-readable description of how AI is used in this game.

systems.description: AI systems used: dda, procedural_dialogue, emotional_state, player_profiling, slm_inference, procedural_generation, adaptive_music, etc.
